text: Daycare just called. Owen's got a fever, needs to be picked up by noon. I'm in a thing until 1:30, can you do it?
I've got a delivery check at 11 and Dani's tied up with a postpartum visit. What's the temp?
101.2. They said he's cranky and clingy, not miserable. Think they'll let him stay another hour if I call?
Try it. If not, call my mom — she's in Asheville this week, she mentioned wanting to see him anyway.
Good call, texting Loretta now. Did you pack the Motrin in your clinic bag or is it still in the car?
Car. Glove box. Tell Owen I'll bring him a popsicle. The orange ones, he'll know.
Hazel did you grab my trauma shears out of the clinic bag again? They're not in the side pocket and I leave for Willow Creek in 20 minutes.
omg I used them to cut ribbon for my project THEYRE ON MY DESK sorry sorry
You owe me one uninterrupted shower. Tell Owen too. Where exactly on your desk.
under the blue folder next to my lamp!! also can you bring home that fetal doppler thing Hazel jr wants to hear her heartbeat again
She is not getting her own doppler. And her name is your stuffed rabbit, which is a whole other conversation. Found the shears, leaving now.
ok love you drive safe tell Dani she still owes me hot chocolate from last time 😤
Staff meeting ran long and I've got a patient in 15 min. Can you grab Hazel from school? Dad's not answering his phone.
yeah already in the car. she's gonna be annoyed it's not you though, just a heads up
Tell her she gets a juice box and I'll read her two books tonight. She'll try to negotiate. Hold firm.
lmao she immediately said 'two juice boxes.' got her tho. she's fine, lecturing me about some frog she saw at recess
Classic. Thank you. Seriously.
you owe me dinner. also she told me frogs are cooler than babies and honestly I didn't have a comeback for that
